title: Temporium Client
description: Temporium client is made to play on the multiplayer server DiamondFire. Specifically the RPG game BCmpact Temporium
body:
Temporium client is made to play the game plot on the DiamondFire server with the name of "BCMpact Temporium"

Additions include:
1. Optimization mods and a shader mod
2. Improved GUI's
3. Improved chat
4. Smooth Scrolling for many elements
5. Chat keybinds and generally improved chat
6. support for a future update of the "Temporium reforged" mod

Download this modpack for the best Temporium experience!

![The title screen of the instance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57df607d4a7d3a5db4229817db069b5ac8e2b32a_0.webp)

If u wanna know wat mods are in the pack check the "versions" tab
